rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low SNR indicates poor signal quality.
suggestedActions: Use proper shielding for sensitive measurements.
Consider efficiency losses in energy calculations.

description.short: Calculate magnetic flux density inside a solenoid.
description.long: Calculate magnetic flux density inside a solenoid.

short_i18n.en: Calculate magnetic flux density inside a solenoid.
short_i18n.tr: Bobin içindeki homojen manyetik akı yoğunluğunu (solenoid) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die magnetische Flussdichte im Inneren einer Spule.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la densité de flux magnétique à l'intérieur d'un solénoïde.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la densidad de flujo magnético dentro de un solenoide.
short_i18n.ar: حساب كثافة التدفق المغناطيسي داخل ملف لولبي.
